steps.title: Identify the contradicting evidence
steps.content: The original assumption linked pale hearts (low myoglobin) to polar habitats. The key signal is the recent discovery that tropical species also have pale hearts — evidence that directly contradicts a habitat-based explanation.

steps.title: Determine what the evidence reveals
steps.content:
”Irrespective of habitat” expresses exactly what the evidence shows: myoglobin deficiency occurs regardless of whether the environment is cold or warm.

The other three contradict the evidence by suggesting habitat influences myoglobin deficiency, reversing the relationship, or introducing an illogical connection.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
